title: [TaCZ] Fatal Contract gunpack
description: A sniper gun pack inspired by Sniper Ghost Warrior series for Timeless and Classics Zero
body:
This is a gun pack for "Timeless and Classic Guns: Zero" , this pack adds some new snipers. You can craft them in survive mode.

这是一个适用于"永恒枪械工坊：零"的枪包，添加了一些狙击步枪。在生存模式下也可以制造并使用它们。

How to install：
This gun pack needs 2 mods to active, one is TaCZ itself, another is TaCZ:Arcana

Open your Minecraft game file, go to .minecraft/tacz, put the whole ziped gun pack in it (no need to unzip), then start the game should be ok.

如何安装：
本包需要两个模组来运行，其一是TaCZ本体，其二是TaCZ:Arcana

打开你的游戏目录，找到根目录/tacz，将整个压缩包扔进去（不需要解压），然后启动游戏即可。
